name: Rakan

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Basic-attack timing values are sourced from From Online stats payload.

passive.name: Fey Feathers
passive.description_source: Innate: Periodically,  Rakan generates a  shield that regenerates out of combat if not broken.

effects.description: Innate: Periodically, Rakan grants himself a shield for 30 : 247.94 (based on level) (+ 95% AP) that lasts until broken. After being out of combat for 5 seconds, any leftover shield will be restored to maximum value.
Rakan's basic attacks and ability hits reduce Fey Feathers' cooldown by 1 second for each enemy champion hit.

Innate - Lover's Leap: If either Rakan or Xayah is channeling Recall, the other may move nearby and channel their own to join alongside them. Both reach base at the time of which the initiator's Recall completes.

passive.description: Innate: Periodically, Rakan grants himself a shield for 30 : 247.94 (based on level) (+ 95% AP) that lasts until broken. After being out of combat for 5 seconds, any leftover shield will be restored to maximum value.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Revitalize will record bonus shielding when a new shield is created, but not when it regenerates.

basic_ability_1.name: Gleaming Quill
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  Rakan slings an enchanted feather in the target direction that deals magic damage to the first enemy hit.

effects.context_notes: Active: Rakan slings an enchanted feather in the target direction that deals magic damage to the first enemy hit.

effects.description: If the target was an enemy champion or epic monster, a radius is marked around Rakan. After 3 seconds or if an allied champion enters the radius, Rakan heals himself and nearby allied champions for 40 : 210 (based on level) (+ 55% AP).

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Rakan slings an enchanted feather in the target direction that deals magic damage to the first enemy hit.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The trigger radius is slightly smaller than the heal radius.

basic_ability_2.name: Grand Entrance
basic_ability_2.description_source: Active:  Rakan  dashes to the target location.

effects.context_notes: Active: Rakan dashes to the target location.

effects.description: Rakan will be knocked down by any immobilizing or polymorphing crowd control during the dash.

basic_ability_2.description: Active: Rakan dashes to the target location. After a 0.35-second delay upon arrival, he deals magic damage to nearby enemies and knocks them up for 1 second.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Sleep does not count for knocking the dash down.

basic_ability_3.name: Battle Dance
basic_ability_3.description_source: Passive:  Rakan can cast or re-cast Battle Dance at an increased  range when targeting  Xayah.

effects.context_notes: Active: Rakan grants a shield to the target allied champion for 3 seconds and then dashes to and around them.

effects.description: Recast: Rakan mimics the first cast's effects.
Rakan will be knocked down by any immobilizing or polymorphing crowd control during the dash.
If Xayah is the target, Battle Dance can be cast from an increased range.

basic_ability_3.description: Active: Rakan grants a shield to the target allied champion for 3 seconds and then dashes to and around them. Battle Dance can be recast within 5 seconds at no additional cost.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Both casts count as ability activations for the purposes of on-cast effects such as Spellblade and triggering Force Pulse's passive.

ultimate.name: The Quickness

effects.context_notes: Active: Rakan breaks into a captivating sprint for 4 seconds, gaining ghosting and 75% bonus movement speed for the duration.
Active: Rakan breaks into a captivating sprint for 4 seconds, gaining ghosting and 75% bonus movement speed for the duration.

effects.description: Colliding with an enemy champion extends The Quickness' duration by 0.25 seconds, which can occur once per champion. When Rakan collides with his first enemy champion, he gains an additional 75% bonus movement speed that decays after 0.5 seconds by 20% every 0.5 seconds, then by 15% after decaying by 60% over 1.5 seconds.
During The Quickness, Rakan cannot basic attack enemy champions he did not collide with, unless the attack command was inputted before the ability was activated.

ultimate.description: Active: Rakan breaks into a captivating sprint for 4 seconds, gaining ghosting and 75% bonus movement speed for the duration. During this time, he deals magic damage to enemies he collides with and charms and slows them by 75% for a duration. This cannot affect the same enemy more than once.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The following table refers for interactions while Rakan is in cast time: Type Cast time Attacking Allowed Abilities Grand Entrance is disabled but can still be buffered.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
